mapper.select: SELECT so.so_id, so.so_no, so.customer_id, DATE_FORMAT(so.order_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS order_date, DATE_FORMAT(so.delivery_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS delivery_date, so.status, so.created_by, DATE_FORMAT(so.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, c.customer_name, m.name AS created_by_name FROM SALES_ORDER so INNER JOIN CUSTOMER c ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id INNER JOIN member m ON so.created_by = m.member_id WHERE so.so_id = #{soId}
SELECT CONCAT( 'SO-', YEAR(NOW()), '-', LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(so_no, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0') ) FROM SALES_ORDER WHERE so_no LIKE CONCAT('SO-', YEAR(NOW()), '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SALES_ORDER (so_no, customer_id, order_date, delivery_date, status, created_by) VALUES (#{soNo}, #{customerId}, #{orderDate}, #{deliveryDate}, 'DRAFT', #{createdBy})
